reasoning: The visualization fails to answer the specific business question 'How much revenue did Teckentrup have... in the years 2021-2024'. The question asks for annual totals ('Wieviel Umsatz ... in den Jahren'), but the chart displays monthly data points overlaid on top of each other. This makes it impossible to read or compare the total yearly revenue directly. Furthermore, plotting four separate lines against a generic 'Month' axis (Jan-Dec) without distinguishing the years clearly creates visual clutter and confusion; a user cannot easily distinguish which line belongs to which year without a legend, nor can they see the aggregate annual performance. A bar chart showing the sum of revenue per year would be the correct approach.
suggested_improvement: Aggregate the data by year (summing monthly revenues) and use a column/bar chart to display the total revenue for each year from 2021 to 2024.
